# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
# @author    Auto-generated by STM32CubeIDE for Visual Studio Code Extension
# -----------------------------------------------------------------------------
cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.20)

project("Stm32f446-Generic")
enable_language(C CXX ASM)
message("Build type: " ${CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE})

# Setup compiler settings
set(CMAKE_C_STANDARD 11)
set(CMAKE_C_STANDARD_REQUIRED ON)
set(CMAKE_C_EXTENSIONS ON)
set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD 20)
set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD_REQUIRED ON)
set(CMAKE_CXX_EXTENSIONS ON)

# Core MCU flags, CPU type, instruction set and FPU setup
set(cpu_PARAMS 
    -mcpu=cortex-m4
    -mthumb
    -mfloat-abi=hard
    -mfpu=fpv4-sp-d16
)

# Sources
set(sources_SRCS
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/Src/main.c
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/Src/startup_stm32f446xx.S
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/Src/syscall.c
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/Src/sysmem.c
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/Drivers/CMSIS/Device/ST/STM32F4xx/Source/Templates/system_stm32f4xx.c
    
    # FreeRTOS
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/FreeRTOS-Kernel/tasks.c
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/FreeRTOS-Kernel/list.c
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/FreeRTOS-Kernel/queue.c
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/FreeRTOS-Kernel/timers.c
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/FreeRTOS-Kernel/portable/GCC/ARM_CM4F/port.c
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/FreeRTOS-Kernel/portable/MemMang/heap_4.c

    # STM32 LL Drivers
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/Drivers/STM32F4xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32f4xx_ll_gpio.c
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/Drivers/STM32F4xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32f4xx_ll_rcc.c
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/Drivers/STM32F4xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32f4xx_ll_utils.c
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/Drivers/STM32F4xx_HAL_Driver/Src/stm32f4xx_ll_exti.c
)

# Include directories
set(include_DIRS
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/Inc
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/Drivers/CMSIS/Core/CMSIS/Core/Include
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/Drivers/CMSIS/Device/ST/STM32F4xx/Include
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/Drivers/STM32F4xx_HAL_Driver/Inc
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/FreeRTOS-Kernel/include
    ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/FreeRTOS-Kernel/portable/GCC/ARM_CM4F
)

# Include directories for each compiler
set(include_c_DIRS)
set(include_cxx_DIRS)
set(include_asm_DIRS)

# Symbols definition
set(symbols_SYMB
    STM32F446xx
    USE_FULL_LL_DRIVER
    ARM_MATH_CM4
)

# Symbols definition for each compiler
set(symbols_c_SYMB)
set(symbols_cxx_SYMB)
set(symbols_asm_SYMB)

# Link directories and names of libraries
set(link_DIRS)
set(link_LIBS CMSISDSP)

# Linker script is defined in cmake/vscode_generated.cmake

# Compiler options
set(compiler_OPTS)

# Linker options
set(linker_OPTS)

# Now call generated cmake
include("cmake/vscode_generated.cmake")

# Apply compiler flags and macros globally so CMSIS-DSP inherits them
add_compile_options(${cpu_PARAMS})
add_compile_definitions(${symbols_SYMB})

# Configure CMSIS-DSP
set(CMSISCORE ${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/Drivers/CMSIS/Core/CMSIS/Core)
add_subdirectory(Drivers/CMSIS-DSP/Source)

# Link directories setup
link_directories(${CMAKE_PROJECT_NAME} ${link_DIRS})

# Create an executable object type
add_executable(${CMAKE_PROJECT_NAME})

# Add sources to executable
target_sources(${CMAKE_PROJECT_NAME} PUBLIC ${sources_SRCS})

# Add include paths
target_include_directories(${CMAKE_PROJECT_NAME} PRIVATE
    ${include_DIRS}
    $<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:C>: ${include_c_DIRS}>
    $<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:CXX>: ${include_cxx_DIRS}>
    $<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:ASM>: ${include_asm_DIRS}>
)

# Add project symbols (macros)
target_compile_definitions(${CMAKE_PROJECT_NAME} PRIVATE
    ${symbols_SYMB}
    $<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:C>: ${symbols_c_SYMB}>
    $<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:CXX>: ${symbols_cxx_SYMB}>
    $<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:ASM>: ${symbols_asm_SYMB}>

    # Configuration specific
    $<$<CONFIG:Debug>:DEBUG>
    $<$<CONFIG:Release>: >
)

# Add linked libraries
target_link_libraries(${CMAKE_PROJECT_NAME} ${link_LIBS})

# Compiler options
target_compile_options(${CMAKE_PROJECT_NAME} PRIVATE
    ${cpu_PARAMS}
    ${compiler_OPTS}
    -fstack-usage
    -Wall
    -Wextra
    -Wpedantic
    -Wno-unused-parameter
    $<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:C>: >
    $<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:CXX>: >
    $<$<COMPILE_LANGUAGE:ASM>:-x assembler-with-cpp -MMD -MP>
    $<$<CONFIG:Debug>:-O0 -g3 -ggdb>
    $<$<CONFIG:Release>:-Os>
)

# Linker options
target_link_options(${CMAKE_PROJECT_NAME} PRIVATE
    -T${linker_script_SRC}
    ${cpu_PARAMS}
    ${linker_OPTS}
    -Wl,-Map=${CMAKE_PROJECT_NAME}.map
    --specs=nosys.specs
    --specs=nano.specs
    -Wl,--start-group
    -lc
    -lm
    -lstdc++
    -lsupc++
    -Wl,--end-group
    -Wl,--print-memory-usage
)

# Set linker script as a dependency to force re-link if it changes
set_target_properties(${CMAKE_PROJECT_NAME} PROPERTIES LINK_DEPENDS ${linker_script_SRC})

# Execute post-build to print size, generate hex and bin
add_custom_command(TARGET ${CMAKE_PROJECT_NAME} POST_BUILD
    COMMAND ${CMAKE_SIZE} $<TARGET_FILE:${CMAKE_PROJECT_NAME}>
    COMMAND ${CMAKE_OBJCOPY} -O ihex $<TARGET_FILE:${CMAKE_PROJECT_NAME}> ${CMAKE_PROJECT_NAME}.hex
    COMMAND ${CMAKE_OBJCOPY} -O binary $<TARGET_FILE:${CMAKE_PROJECT_NAME}> ${CMAKE_PROJECT_NAME}.bin
)
